master_style: MASTER STYLE: Vibrant, warm children's book illustration in soft digital painting style. Clean outlines with rich saturated colors. Set in an ancient Middle Eastern Biblical landscape with golden sandy terrain, sun-bleached stone houses, dusty olive trees, and wide blue skies. Main character Jesus is a tall adult man with warm olive skin, long dark brown wavy hair, a short beard, and kind brown eyes, wearing flowing white robes with a pale blue sash. Supporting characters Lazarus is a middle-aged man with olive skin, dark curly hair, and wrapped in linen burial cloths. Mary is a young woman with long dark hair, olive skin, wearing deep teal robes and a head covering. Martha is a slightly older woman with olive skin, dark hair pinned up, wearing rust-orange robes and a headscarf. All characters wear sandals and period-appropriate biblical clothing. Art style is gentle, expressive, and inviting with warm golden light evoking hope and wonder. 16:9 landscape format.
page_prompts: A warm sunny day in an ancient Middle Eastern village with sandy pathways and stone houses. Jesus, a tall man with olive skin, long dark wavy hair, short beard, and white robes with a pale blue sash, stands smiling warmly beside Lazarus, a middle-aged man with olive skin and dark curly hair wearing a simple brown tunic. The two friends laugh together near a low stone wall with a lush olive tree behind them, their body language close and joyful. Golden afternoon light bathes the scene with a feeling of friendship and peace. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Inside a modest stone home with arched windows letting in soft light, Lazarus lies on a low wooden bed covered in simple linen blankets, his olive-skinned face pale and sweaty, eyes closed. His dark curly hair is damp and his expression is pained. Mary in deep teal robes and Martha in rust-orange robes kneel beside him, their faces creased with worry, hands clasped in concern. The room is dimly lit with a single oil lamp casting a soft warm glow, creating a quiet, tender mood of sadness and worry. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Outside the stone house under a pale blue sky, Mary in deep teal robes and Martha in rust-orange robes stand together urgently speaking to a young male messenger boy in a tan tunic. Mary holds a small rolled scroll in her outstretched hand, her expression desperate and pleading. Martha points into the distance toward the horizon where a dusty road winds away between sandy hills. The mood is urgent and hopeful, with warm midday sunlight and a few scattered olive trees in the background. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A wide sunny landscape of golden sandy hills and a dusty winding road stretching into the distance. Jesus, tall with olive skin, long dark wavy hair, white robes and a pale blue sash, stands calmly with a small group of disciples on the road, not yet moving toward Bethany. He holds one hand to his chest with a composed, knowing expression, his eyes gentle and peaceful. A small bird perches on a nearby branch, and the horizon glows with warm sunlight. The mood is calm and mysterious, as if Jesus has a quiet, purposeful reason for waiting. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A somber scene outside a stone village at dusk with a warm orange and purple sky. Jesus, tall in white robes and blue sash, walks along a dusty road toward the village, his expression gentle but serious. Martha in rust-orange robes runs toward him from the village gate, her face tearful and her arms outstretched, her headscarf flowing behind her. Mary in teal robes stands further back near the gate, head bowed, shoulders hunched in grief. The mood is heavy with sadness and longing, bathed in the soft golden-pink light of the setting sun. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A rocky hillside landscape with a large ancient tomb carved into pale stone, its entrance sealed by a massive round boulder. The scene is viewed from a slight distance, showing the scale of the huge stone. A group of mourners in muted earth-toned robes stand nearby, some weeping and embracing. Tall cypress trees flank the hillside and the sky is a soft cloudy blue-grey. The mood is solemn and still, with the heavy stone emphasizing the finality of the sealed tomb. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A close and tender scene at the entrance of the rocky tomb, with the great boulder visible nearby. Jesus, tall with olive skin, dark wavy hair, white robes and blue sash, stands before the tomb with tears streaming gently down his cheeks, his eyes red and glistening. Mary in teal robes weeps at his feet, and Martha stands nearby wiping her eyes. A small crowd of mourners watches quietly behind them. The lighting is soft and overcast, casting a mood of deep sorrow, compassion, and love. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A dramatic scene at the rocky tomb entrance as Jesus, tall in white robes and pale blue sash, raises one strong arm outward and points decisively toward the great round boulder, his expression powerful and authoritative. Several men in earth-toned robes lean against the massive stone, beginning to push it aside, their faces showing effort and astonishment. Dust swirls around the boulder as it shifts. Mary and Martha stand nearby wide-eyed with hands clasped. The sky behind brightens with golden light as if something miraculous is about to happen. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Jesus, tall with olive skin, long dark wavy hair, white robes and blue sash, stands upright before the now-open dark tomb entrance with both arms raised toward it, his face glowing with authority and divine power, eyes lifted heavenward. His expression is bold and full of confident love. The crowd behind him is frozen in hushed anticipation, mouths open, eyes wide. Bright golden light radiates from inside the dark tomb opening. The sandy rocky landscape is lit dramatically as if the whole world is holding its breath. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A joyful and miraculous scene at the tomb entrance as Lazarus, olive-skinned with dark curly hair, steps out from the glowing dark opening still wrapped head to toe in white linen burial cloths, his eyes wide open and alive, a look of wonder on his face. Jesus stands to the side with arms outstretched and a radiant joyful smile, white robes glowing in golden light. Mary and Martha rush toward Lazarus with tears of joy, arms wide open. The crowd behind erupts in amazement, hands raised, mouths open. Golden sunlight floods the entire scene with warmth and miraculous joy. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A bright celebratory scene under a wide brilliant blue sky with the stone village and olive trees in the background. Jesus, tall with olive skin, dark wavy hair, white robes and blue sash, stands in the center with one hand on Lazarus's shoulder, smiling warmly at the viewer. Lazarus, now wearing a clean simple brown tunic, stands tall and healthy with a joyful grin. Mary and Martha stand on either side beaming with happiness, hands clasped in gratitude. The crowd around them celebrates with uplifted arms and joyful faces, bathed in glorious warm golden light conveying wonder, power, and hope. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.
